entries.title: Boundary map bundle
entries.purpose: Create explicit TLS boundary map for runtime and graph seams.
entries.what_it_builds: Boundary map artifact with allowed and blocked interfaces.
entries.why_it_matters: Defines clear boundary before any integration execution.
acceptance_criteria: Boundary map lists allowed retrieve-only outputs.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt writes boundary map only.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all interfaces are classified allow/block.

entries.title: Boundary red-team round
entries.purpose: Run adversarial checks against boundary map.
entries.what_it_builds: Red-team findings on boundary abuse paths.
entries.why_it_matters: Finds fail-open seams before integration.
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 abuse paths executed with deterministic outcomes.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt for red-team report only.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all abuse paths have pass/fail results.

entries.title: Boundary fix bundle
entries.purpose: Patch boundary map gaps found in red-team round.
entries.what_it_builds: Updated boundary map and blocked-key list.
entries.why_it_matters: Ensures boundary hardening closes observed failure modes.
acceptance_criteria: All high-severity findings from prior step are resolved.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt applies map fixes only.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when unresolved finding count is zero.

entries.title: Integration seam bundle
entries.purpose: Build runtime+graph integration seam contract.
entries.what_it_builds: Integration seam contract with fail_closed behavior.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents regressions while wiring TLS outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Contract validates all mandatory seam fields.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt for seam contract and schema check.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when contract validates against fixtures.

entries.title: Integration red-team round
entries.purpose: Probe integration seams for fallback and coupling risk.
entries.what_it_builds: Seam red-team findings and risk labels.
entries.why_it_matters: Catches fallback regressions pre-runtime rollout.
acceptance_criteria: Report includes fallback abuse scenario outcomes.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt for seam red-team outputs.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all listed seam risks are tested.

entries.title: Integration fix bundle
entries.purpose: Fix integration seam weaknesses found in red-team.
entries.what_it_builds: Patched seam contract and fallback guards.
entries.why_it_matters: Restores fail_closed integration behavior.
acceptance_criteria: No open high-severity seam findings remain.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt for seam fixes only.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when red-team high findings are closed.

entries.title: Ranking trust calibration bundle
entries.purpose: Calibrate ranking trust and deterministic tie breaks.
entries.what_it_builds: Calibration profile and tie-break table.
entries.why_it_matters: Improves recommendation stability under sparse evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Replay variance stays inside defined threshold.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when variance threshold passes.

entries.title: Ranking red-team round
entries.purpose: Stress ranking with adversarial sparse-input fixtures.
entries.what_it_builds: Ranking red-team findings.
entries.why_it_matters: Finds unstable ordering paths early.
acceptance_criteria: Adversarial suite outcomes are deterministic.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when required scenarios all executed.

entries.title: Ranking fix bundle
entries.purpose: Patch ranking calibration from red-team findings.
entries.what_it_builds: Updated calibration profile and guard thresholds.
entries.why_it_matters: Locks deterministic recommendation ordering.
acceptance_criteria: No unresolved high findings remain.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when high findings count equals zero.

entries.title: Action layer schema bundle
entries.purpose: Create recommendation-only action layer schema.
entries.what_it_builds: Action layer schema and rationale packet template.
entries.why_it_matters: Keeps TLS outputs operator-usable and read-only.
acceptance_criteria: Schema forbids runtime mutation fields.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when schema validation passes local fixture.

entries.title: Action layer red-team round
entries.purpose: Test schema for hidden authority wording and side-effect fields.
entries.what_it_builds: Action layer red-team report.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents recommendation packet ambiguity.
acceptance_criteria: Report shows zero critical schema bypasses.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when bypass attempts are exhausted.

entries.title: Action layer fix bundle
entries.purpose: Apply schema tightenings from red-team outcomes.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed action layer schema.
entries.why_it_matters: Ensures recommendation-only output format remains strict.
acceptance_criteria: All mandatory schema constraints are active.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all mandatory constraints validated.

entries.title: Control bridge mapping bundle
entries.purpose: Create owner-safe field mapping for control-plane input bridge.
entries.what_it_builds: Field mapping contract with blocked owner keys.
entries.why_it_matters: Allows retrieve of TLS context without ownership crossing.
acceptance_criteria: Mapping contains only allowed recommendation fields.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt for mapping and fixture check.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when blocked-key list is complete.

entries.title: Control bridge red-team round
entries.purpose: Probe bridge mapping with owner-key injection attempts.
entries.what_it_builds: Control bridge red-team findings.
entries.why_it_matters: Detects boundary bypass attempts before use.
acceptance_criteria: All injection attempts are blocked.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when injection matrix complete.

entries.title: Control bridge fix bundle
entries.purpose: Patch mapping and guards based on red-team results.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed owner-safe control bridge mapping.
entries.why_it_matters: Maintains safe cross-system retrieve path.
acceptance_criteria: No high-risk bridge findings remain open.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when high-risk findings resolved.

entries.title: Learning loop ledger bundle
entries.purpose: Build deterministic learning update ledger and schema constraints.
entries.what_it_builds: Learning ledger schema and bounded update profile.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents uncontrolled recommendation drift.
acceptance_criteria: Ledger enforces bounded update deltas.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when schema and sample entries validate.

entries.title: Learning loop red-team round
entries.purpose: Stress learning loop with noisy feedback fixtures.
entries.what_it_builds: Learning loop red-team findings.
entries.why_it_matters: Surfaces drift and instability risks early.
acceptance_criteria: Red-team includes poisoning and replay divergence cases.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all required noisy cases run.

entries.title: Learning loop fix bundle
entries.purpose: Apply safeguards for red-team findings in learning loop.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed learning loop ledger and update caps.
entries.why_it_matters: Stabilizes recommendation updates across runs.
acceptance_criteria: Update caps and replay linkage pass fixtures.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when no open high findings remain.

entries.title: Drift detection bundle
entries.purpose: Build drift signal extractor and threshold profile.
entries.what_it_builds: Drift signal artifact and baseline rules.
entries.why_it_matters: Detects regressions before operator-facing surfaces refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Extractor emits deterministic severity outputs.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when baseline and thresholds validate.

entries.title: Drift detection red-team round
entries.purpose: Adversarially test drift thresholds and stale baseline handling.
entries.what_it_builds: Drift red-team report.
entries.why_it_matters: Ensures drift checks fail closed on invalid baselines.
acceptance_criteria: Stale baseline case fails closed in report.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when stale and bypass cases executed.

entries.title: Drift detection fix bundle
entries.purpose: Patch drift thresholds and baseline guards from findings.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed drift detection profile.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents repeated stale-baseline drift misses.
acceptance_criteria: All high-risk drift findings closed.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when high-risk findings closed.

entries.title: Dataset map bundle
entries.purpose: Create deterministic dataset-to-eval mapping artifact.
entries.what_it_builds: Dataset map with coverage metadata and version pins.
entries.why_it_matters: Anchors eval governance to traceable inputs.
acceptance_criteria: Each dataset row includes eval mapping id.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all dataset rows map to eval ids.

entries.title: Eval governance gate bundle
entries.purpose: Build fail_closed eval governance gate for TLS updates.
entries.what_it_builds: Eval governance gate artifact and schema checks.
entries.why_it_matters: Blocks unverified updates from entering later phases.
acceptance_criteria: Gate blocks when required eval map is incomplete.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when fail_closed checks pass fixtures.

entries.title: Dataset+eval red-team round
entries.purpose: Red-team dataset map and eval gate for bypass attempts.
entries.what_it_builds: Dataset/eval red-team findings.
entries.why_it_matters: Validates governance gate under adversarial inputs.
acceptance_criteria: Bypass attempts are blocked and logged.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when spoofing scenarios complete.

entries.title: Dataset+eval fix bundle
entries.purpose: Patch dataset/eval controls from red-team results.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed dataset map and eval gate artifacts.
entries.why_it_matters: Maintains trusted update eligibility path.
acceptance_criteria: No open high-risk findings remain.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when high-risk findings resolved.

entries.title: Operator intelligence bundle
entries.purpose: Generate operator intelligence summaries from governed TLS artifacts.
entries.what_it_builds: Operator intelligence summary artifact and retrieve index.
entries.why_it_matters: Improves clarity without dashboard coupling.
acceptance_criteria: Summary references artifacts only, no ui assumptions.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when summary links all source artifacts.

entries.title: Operator intelligence red-team round
entries.purpose: Test summary for ambiguity, stale links, and hidden behavior.
entries.what_it_builds: Operator intelligence red-team report.
entries.why_it_matters: Protects operator retrieve quality and trust.
acceptance_criteria: All summary links resolve to existing artifacts.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when link and ambiguity tests complete.

entries.title: Operator intelligence fix bundle
entries.purpose: Fix summary issues found during red-team pass.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed operator intelligence summary artifact.
entries.why_it_matters: Keeps operator-facing outputs clear and bounded.
acceptance_criteria: No unresolved high findings remain.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when unresolved high findings are zero.

entries.title: TPA input context bundle
entries.purpose: Create read-only TPA context packet schema with blocked owner keys.
entries.what_it_builds: Read-only TPA context packet and observation input shape.
entries.why_it_matters: Allows TPA-owned policy evaluation to retrieve TLS context without ownership transfer.
acceptance_criteria: Schema allows metadata-only policy annotations.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt for schema and guard check.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when schema blocks disallowed owner keys.

entries.title: TPA input red-team round
entries.purpose: Attempt owner-key and side-effect injection on TPA input context packets.
entries.what_it_builds: TPA input red-team findings.
entries.why_it_matters: Ensures TPA input context packets remain recommendation-only and read-only.
acceptance_criteria: All injection attempts are blocked by schema.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when full injection matrix executed.

entries.title: TPA input fix bundle
entries.purpose: Apply TPA input context schema fixes from red-team findings.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed read-only TPA context packet schema artifact.
entries.why_it_matters: Closes bypass paths before simulation phase.
acceptance_criteria: No open high-risk TPA input findings remain.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when high-risk findings resolved.

entries.title: Simulation harness bundle
entries.purpose: Run deterministic simulation scenarios for TLS recommendation behavior.
entries.what_it_builds: Simulation outcomes artifact with scenario matrix.
entries.why_it_matters: Validates behavior under edge and adversarial inputs.
acceptance_criteria: Simulation matrix includes adversarial and sparse-input cases.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when all required scenarios pass determinism check.

entries.title: Simulation red-team round
entries.purpose: Red-team simulation harness for hidden fallback and coupling.
entries.what_it_builds: Simulation red-team report.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents latent fallback paths from reaching final integration.
acceptance_criteria: Fallback probes include explicit visible marker checks.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when fallback probes are complete.

entries.title: Simulation fix bundle
entries.purpose: Patch simulation harness and scenarios from red-team report.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed simulation outcomes artifact and guard notes.
entries.why_it_matters: Ensures stable basis for final integration.
acceptance_criteria: No unresolved high findings remain in simulation report.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when high-risk findings equal zero.

entries.title: Final OS integration map bundle
entries.purpose: Build final OS integration map for TLS recommendation input channel.
entries.what_it_builds: Final OS integration map and compatibility checklist.
entries.why_it_matters: Completes operator-ready integration without ownership crossing.
acceptance_criteria: Compatibility checklist passes all required integration fixtures.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt for map and compatibility run.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when compatibility checklist passes.

entries.title: Final OS integration red-team round
entries.purpose: Probe final integration map for authority and runtime regression risks.
entries.what_it_builds: Final integration red-team findings.
entries.why_it_matters: Catches last-mile integration failures before closeout artifact creation.
acceptance_criteria: All listed final integration abuse cases are executed.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when abuse-case matrix complete.

entries.title: Final OS integration fix bundle
entries.purpose: Apply fixes from final integration red-team outcomes.
entries.what_it_builds: Fixed final OS integration map and readiness check artifact.
entries.why_it_matters: Produces operator-ready integration artifact with fail_closed behavior.
acceptance_criteria: All high-risk final integration findings are resolved and readiness checks pass.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single fix prompt and readiness check emission.
entries.stop_condition: Stop when readiness check passes and no high findings remain.
